summary.title: Preparation reviewed
summary.body: Remember to verify all equipment physically before entering the water.

disclaimer.title: Before you start
disclaimer.p1: DivePrep Buddy helps you organize pre-dive preparation.
disclaimer.p2: It does not replace dive training, professional instruction, certified dive safety procedures, or a dive computer.
disclaimer.p3: Always verify your equipment physically and follow your training.

safety.footer: Preparation assistant only — not a safety authority.

offline.banner: Offline mode active. Your checklists still work on this device.
